recentFeedback.feedback: Switch ALL models to kimi-coding/k2p5 — Anthropic usage too high

Adding JSON text fields is NOT building
Auto-announce messages should be natural language, not long paragraphs
Agent config has its own model setting separate from cron payloads

lessonsLearned: Building = functional software ONLY: widgets, features, tools, automations
Content briefs = research output, NOT building
JSON text fields = research output, NOT building
Agent model config is separate from cron payload model — must update BOTH
Commit research files to docs/research/ so auditor can verify
Auto-announce messages burn tokens on main session — keep main session on cheapest model
Nox agent config at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json agents.list[0].model controls isolated session defaults
All tools must be browser-accessible — Steven uses a different computer
Data in the dashboard > standalone tools
